name: Unholy :∞: Hero - [NTR?]
description:
“God has abandoned us. However is it true that god has abandoned us? Or it's us who abandoned god?”

Ein/One

“The chosen one, one that has been chosen, one... Choose... One..."

"We're too engrossed to a story about one person... The chosen one... We forget about those who's around the one, those who create and mold the one, those who live their best, those who create remarkable memory, those who write their own story other than the one... As if the world resolved around the one..."

"Was it our fate? To be forgotten by the time, letting 'the chosen one' carve their name in history and twist us to be a statistics in the thick book of history. Are we just destined to be one of a number in an old book? Was the life we've spent, and memories we create was meant to be another statistics? Was the god create the world just to be a playground for the chosen one?"

Repent

"No... That's not our fate, our life, our memories, our relationship, our every breath meant something and it's not for the one's amusement, not to be forgotten and in vain..."

"One sin make someone become a sinner and a single good deeds make someone become a saint. With twisted mind and logic the chosen one travel around the world, ruining more lives than they actually save. They come to anyone's house, taking what's inside, shattering the bond of marriage by taking other's spouse, other's love, brainwash, tear the balance of world, and many hideous things i cannot speak of... Things that beyond your comprehension."

"Yes the chosen one... But for what exactly goddess chose them? Why the goddess chose them? What's the meaning of the chosen one?... Was their claim as the chosen one was... True?"

"I've to a conclusion, the chosen one is abomination. An anomaly that's not supposed to be exist... At least not if the person who hold the power isn't worthy for them to wield... People need someone to stop this cycle or it'll consume them entirely to the point that they'll forget about kindness, compassion, and love... Will we stand still and let the chosen one ruin our home?... What are we lamenting for? Why we still repent after all these years?"

"SO RISE DEAR KNIGHT!""LET YOUR SOUL BECOME THE SWORD OF GOD, CARVE YOUR BODY TO BECOME THE SHIELD OF GOD, CAST YOUR SHADOW TO PROTECT THOSE BEHIND YOU, HELD YOUR CHIN HIGH AND RISE YOUR CHEST! LET OUR ENEMIES SEE AND FEARED YOUR PRESENCE, HEAR THEY SCREAM, FEEL THEIR AGONY, REPENT THE SORROW, ANSWER THE CALL... Your calling... People's calling..."

"In this long long story, we'll ended up becoming the one of the statistics... But we carve our name in the heaven's above, we're not the chosen one but the one's above choose us, to be born, to live, to feel, to dream, to believe..."

"May god forgive us all, blessings to all soul... Heard the melody of lacrimosa to the end, a doleful song of woe, a silent scream of l
creator: AvGen_Fr
